name: workflow-kit
description: Workflow plugin for work-definition interviews, execution workflows, review loops, and final readiness gates.

interface.shortDescription: Definition, execution, review, and readiness workflows for any task size.
interface.longDescription: Provides workflow skills that help Codex define a task correctly before acting, choose the right execution mode, iterate on issues, review material findings, and run final readiness gates before work moves toward commit.
defaultPrompt: Run this feature request end-to-end with autopilot.
Interview me first so the implementation aligns tightly with what I actually mean.
Before doing this bug fix or edit, ask the one key question that locks scope and success criteria.
Split these independent tasks into safe parallel work and integrate the result.
Take this brief from implementation through verification.
Handle this task autonomously and report the final status.
Check whether this change is commit-ready before I commit it.
